title: verbena officinalis var. spuria
intro: Verbena officinalis var. spuria is a perennial herb belonging to the Verbenaceae family, commonly known as the Spuria Verbena. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Verbena officinalis var. spuria include treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as reducing fever and relieving menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
